chain_edges.notes: Cerebras IPO with 24%/62% revenue concentration is the named disclosure stress-test that pushes hyperscalers into per-AI-business KPI disclosure.

Cerebras IPO at $22-25B with 24%/62% concentration named as SEC/analyst forcing function for foundation-lab WAU disclosure.
MCP-protocol attack-surface pressure (MCPwn CVE, OWASP MCP Top 10 push) is the forcing function hyperscalers respond to with default-on tenant MCP allow/block.
Okta Agent Discovery + virtual-MCP-server registry primitive is the control-plane substrate Microsoft Agent 365 GA wires into Entra/Purview at $15/user.
SGLang CVE-2026-5760 unpatched-into-May-1 trio is the inference-runtime input the focal chain prediction extends with kernel LPE.
AI-Infra CVE sub-catalog momentum (KEV adds) precedes a CSAI-CNA advisory carving out the LLM-tooling + kernel chain as a named technique.
LLM-INFRA-CWE primitive supply-chain framing scaffolds the named LLM-tooling chain that the focal prediction expects to carve out.
An IR post-mortem chaining LLM-tooling + Copy Fail kernel LPE accelerates CISA AI-Infra KEV sub-catalog publication.
